// why this file: Build config used ONLY by Stryker's buildCommand (see stryker.config.json).
It is deliberately self-contained (no `extends`): Stryker copies the package
relative extends chain. Compiler options mirror tsconfig.base.json +
- noCheck: Stryker's mutants are syntactically valid but often type-invalid
(e.g. string arithmetic); we emit without type checking so every mutant
actually RUNS and must be killed by a test, not by the compiler.
- no declarations/sourcemaps: dead weight per sandbox build.
